original: Of course, your run-of-the-mill leashes these days are wireless. This 20-foot long tether of strong, flexible black leather tipped with an adaptable steel clasp is for traditionalists - or for owners who want to make very clear who the party at the other end belongs to. The leather retracts back into a satisfyingly hefty steel handle and can be frozen at any length at the press of a button, allowing for close control.
